title: Bhored's Banana Sandwich Modpack
description: Highly approved mods that Bhored the owner plays on Banana Sandwich
body:
# 📦 Bhored’s Banana Sandwich Modpack
Welcome to Bhored’s official modpack for the Banana Sandwich server!
This pack includes all approved, tested, and fully compatible mods used by Bhored and the server team.
If you’re joining the Banana Sandwich community, this modpack ensures you have the correct setup, the intended gameplay balance, and the smoothest experience possible.

## ✨ What This Modpack Provides
✔️ All mods required to join the Banana Sandwich server
✔️ Performance improvements
✔️ Quality-of-life features selected and approved by Bhored
✔️ Consistent versions matching the server’s configuration
✔️ Zero guesswork — simply install and play

## 🎮 Server Compatibility
- This modpack is specifically built for the Banana Sandwich server.
Every included mod has been:
- Verified for stability
- Tested alongside server plugins/mods
- Confirmed to work with the server’s version of Minecraft and Fabric/Forge (depending on your setup)
- If you want a hassle-free way to join the server with full compatibility, this is it.

**🌟 Why Use This Pack?**
- Using the wrong mods or versions can lead to:
- Crashes
- Mismatches
- Missing features
- Connection issues

_This pack eliminates all of that.
By using Bhored’s official modpack, you’re guaranteed to have the exact environment the server expects._

## 📥 Getting Started
- Download the .mrpack file
- Import it into the Modrinth App or another supported launcher
- Launch the game
- Join the Banana Sandwich server!
- You’re ready to play.

💬 Credits
Maintained by: Bhored (Server Owner)
Pack curated for: The Banana Sandwich community
Compatible with: Minecraft 1.21.10 (or whichever version you set)
